chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – Inheritance of the new born

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/234)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/234)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْمَنْفُوسَ لَا يَرِثُ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ شَيْئاً حَتَّى يَسْتَهِلَّ وَ يُسْمَعَ صَوْتُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Ibn Awn, from one of them who said,
‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying that the new born does not inherit anything from the wergild until it moves and his voice is heard’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from ibn ‘Awn from certain persons of them who has narrated the following: “I once heard him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘A newborn does not inherit from a wergild anything unless he cries at the time of birth and his voice is heard.’”
